title: calceolaria glacialis
intro: Calceolaria glacialis, also known as Frost gentian or Mountain slipper, is a flowering plant species native to the high-altitude regions of South America. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and terpenoids. The health benefits of Calceolaria glacialis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and exhibit antioxidant properties. The herbal preparations of this plant can be found in various forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which are commonly used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
